programme.title: Will Trent
programme.desc: Reeling yet relentless, the team hunts Adelaide and searches for Antonio; Adelaide systematically eliminates her own acolytes; Will teeters on the edge, haunted by a grief so strong it could unravel the team.

programme.desc: R.J. struggles with a difficult decision; Emi must contend with her family's secrets.

programme.desc: When a renowned retired astronaut is murdered in plain sight, Morgan and the team uncover some of his mysterious entanglements; Soto travels to New York to meet a high-profile political fixer connected to Roman's disappearance.
